name: codex-unity-agent-kit
description: Unity, C#, and ASP.NET backend workflows for Codex: orientation, planning, cross-agent delivery, implementation, testing, debugging, merge-conflict recovery, builds, upgrades, profiling, review, validation, learning capture, PR handoff, plan grilling, and Unity MCP editor work.

interface.shortDescription: Unity, C#, and ASP.NET agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: Codex Unity Agent Kit packages focused workflows for Unity and ASP.NET game development: project orientation (unity-orient, backend-orient), safe implementation (unity-implement, backend-implement), test authoring (unity-tests), root-cause debugging (unity-debug, backend-debug), scene/prefab merge conflicts (unity-merge), player builds and CI (unity-build), editor and package upgrades (unity-upgrade), measured performance work (unity-profile), review and validation for both stacks, planning and cross-agent delivery (planning, crossworking), plan grilling (grill-me), reusable learning capture (learn), Pull Request handoff (create-mr), and Unity Editor MCP automation (unity-mcp).
defaultPrompt: Orient in this Unity or ASP.NET project before editing.
Implement this Unity C# or ASP.NET backend change safely.
Review and validate these C# changes before create-mr.
